prestazioni: Garrett GT2867R Gen II turbo upgrade for the EA888 Evo4 (DNWA) engine, targeting 380-400 HP on 98 RON fuel with a custom BorgWarner 46 lb/hr fuel injector setup and APR Stage 3+ ECU calibration (software version 3.1.10) for optimized wastegate duty cycle and torque shaping

034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts with 75A durometer polyurethane inserts to eliminate EA888 Evo4 engine movement under aggressive launch control (0-60 mph in 3.4s) while maintaining NVH for daily driving

APR Carbon Fiber intake system with integrated IAT sensor relocation and heat shielding, paired with a custom 3.5" velocity stack for improved airflow linearity into the DNWA engine, reducing intake air temps by 12°C under full boost (22 psi peak)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (8Y-specific) with extended front fenders (+35mm) and rear quarter panels (+40mm), paired with custom carbon fiber overfenders for weight reduction (1.2kg savings per side) and aggressive stance over OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET35 wheels

Audi Sport ABT RS3-style front grille with laser-cut honeycomb mesh (0.8mm thickness) and gloss black powder-coated surround, retaining OEM adaptive LED matrix headlights but with LUX H8 V4 LED bulbs for +120% lumen output and custom DRL delete

Milltek Sport 3.5" titanium cat-back exhaust system with dual 100mm carbon fiber tips (angled 15° downward) and internal resonators tuned for a 3,200 RPM burble on overrun, paired with a custom valved X-pipe for EA888 Evo4-specific sound engineering
